signals.raw:
Ripple Partners with Kyobo Life Insurance for Tokenization | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple announced a partnership with South Korea’s Kyobo Life Insurance on April 16 to tokenize government bond settlements, driving a 4.4% XRP price jump to over $1.40 and flipping retail sentiment to bullish.[5]

signals.headline: XRP Surges on Strong U
signals.raw:
XRP Surges on Strong U.S. Spot ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**  
XRP has risen 12.5% from its April lows amid $41.64 million in net inflows to U.S. spot ETFs for the week ending April 16—the largest in three months and a 254% jump from the prior week—signaling accelerating demand and a potential cup-and-handle breakout above $1.46.[1]
